data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: Spotify utilizes a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and manageability.
data.technical_spec: Distributed systems, RESTful APIs, Docker, Kubernetes

data.title: AWS Cloud Integration
data.description: Spotify integrates extensively with AWS to leverage cloud computing capabilities.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Fast content delivery is enhanced by using global CDNs.

data.title: Data Streaming Pipelines
data.description: Real-time data streaming is integral to Spotify's operations, especially for user analytics and recommendations.

data.title: NoSQL and SQL Databases
data.description: Spotify uses a combination of NoSQL and SQL databases for data storage and retrieval.
